name: marketplace
description: Official a5c.ai plugin marketplace for babysitter

basic-security.name: basic-security
basic-security.description: Install security processes, skills, agents and commands from the babysitter security-compliance library into your project. Includes post-install codebase security scan.
basic-security.author: a5c-ai

sound-hooks.name: sound-hooks
sound-hooks.description: Play sound effects on Claude Code lifecycle events via hooks in .claude/settings.json — searches and downloads themed mp3 files for session start, tool use, errors, and notifications. Optional babysitter hooks integration.
sound-hooks.author: a5c-ai

github-actions-cicd.name: github-actions-cicd
github-actions-cicd.description: Set up babysitter-powered GitHub Actions workflows with triggers on issue comments, PR events, labels, schedules, and manual dispatch. Based on docs/github-actions-setup.md.
github-actions-cicd.author: a5c-ai

rate-limit-handler.name: rate-limit-handler
rate-limit-handler.description: Configure Claude Code hooks to detect and handle API rate limit errors with exponential backoff, jitter, and automatic retry. Prevents sessions from getting stuck on rate limits.
rate-limit-handler.author: a5c-ai

project-deployment.name: project-deployment
project-deployment.description: Set up deployment infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud provisioning. Supports Terraform+K8s+Helm on AWS/GCP/Azure, Vercel/Cloudflare+Supabase, Docker containers, and serverless. Copies relevant devops-sre-platform processes from the library.
project-deployment.author: a5c-ai

testing-suite.name: testing-suite
testing-suite.description: Set up comprehensive testing infrastructure — unit, integration, Storybook component tests in browser, E2E, visual regression, and coverage enforcement in CI/CD. Flexible framework selection based on stack. Copies QA testing processes from the library.
testing-suite.author: a5c-ai

themes.name: themes
themes.description: Apply any theme to your project — sound effects, design system, conversational personality, and decorative assets. No predefined list: name any movie, game, art style, mood, character, or concept and the installer interviews you, researches the theme, then searches, downloads, and generates all resources. Includes all sound-hooks functionality plus CLAUDE.md integration for themed speech patterns and visual design tokens. Assets stored in .a5c/themes/ with symlink switching.
themes.author: a5c-ai
